Name: More More More Performance! (T3MP)
Description: Make Timberborn's simulation actually run FASTER at high game speed - a real, algorithmic way to optimize the CPU-bound sim, NOT a speed multiplier and NOT a benchmark tool. More More More Performance! (T3MP) rebuilds the heaviest hot paths (tick dispatch, hauling, pathfinding / travel-time estimates, need decisions, water) so large late-game colonies and fast-forward keep up. Measured per full in-game day on a large colony: about 1.5x the unmodded tick rate, always on; about 1.75x with the optional Shift+P render-skip turbo. Because it makes every simulation tick cheaper for the CPU, a heavy colony that was CPU-bound also gets more fps headroom. It does NOT change game speed - keep using the base game's speed controls or any speed mod; this makes those actually deliver instead of stuttering. Behavior-identical to vanilla: pathfinding, reservations, inventories and water are never skipped or approximated, so you get the exact same colony - no farmer bugs, no save risk. Optimizations turn on automatically a few seconds after a save loads, and a live tick-rate meter is shown bottom-right. Actively maintained for the current game version. [JP] シミュ自体を速くする本物の最適化mod。速度の倍率を変えるのではなく、CPUがボトルネックになっている計算を軽くして、高速再生や大規模コロニーが本当に速く（faster）回るようにします。重いコロニーではCPU負荷が下がるぶんfpsの余裕も生まれます。挙動はバニラと完全一致（経路・予約・在庫・水を一切省略・近似しない）ので結果は同じ＝農夫バグやセーブ破損の心配なし。常時約1.5倍、Shift+Pのターボで約1.75倍。keywords: performance, speed, faster, optimize, optimization, lag, fps, late game, large colony, tick rate.
